name: Operation on a Resource after Expiration or Release
description: The product uses, accesses, or otherwise operates on a resource after that resource has been expired, released, or revoked. Common manifestations include use-after-free, double-free, and expired session or certificate usage.
detection_pattern: STORAGE or STRUCTURAL node is accessed by TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes after a CONTROL[release] or TRANSFORM[free] node has terminated the resource, or after a META[expiration] timestamp has passed
